candidates.why: Most semantically direct top-line revenue label; suitable as primary even if preview is empty.
Reported total revenue line, but appears to include Other operating income in addition to sales.
COGS, not revenue.
Operating expense, not revenue.
Operating expense, not revenue.
Balance sheet liability, not income statement revenue.
Balance sheet liability, not revenue.

variables.notes: Used candidate labels only. 'Revenue' is preferred as the cleanest top-line sales label; 'Total Revenue' is secondary because it appears to include 'Other operating income'.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods and service sold
candidates.why: Best direct COGS label; populated across years and matches cost of revenues concept.

candidates.row_label: Cost of Goods and Services Sold
candidates.why: Very similar alternate COGS label, but values look less reliable/inconsistent in some years.
Explicit COGS label; values match the preferred line in most shown years, so useful as fallback.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods and service sold - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not preferred when direct COGS rows exist.

final_choice.row_label: Cost of goods and service sold

variables.notes: Selected direct COGS rows and excluded balancing value. Provided a fallback because labels appear to vary.

candidates.why: Potential SG&A-related overhead component, but preview is empty and less specific than other available overhead rows.
Can be an SG&A overhead component and is explicitly allowed.
Balance sheet liability, not period SG&A expense.
Related to SG&A but should be excluded because D&A must not be included in XSGA components.

variables.notes: Candidate list clearly missed the best SG&A expense rows. Selected exact A-column labels 'Sales and marketing expenses' and 'Administrative expense' as the best overhead components, plus 'Share-Based Compensation'. Excluded subtotal-style rows ('Sales and marketing costs', 'General and administration costs') because they appear to include D&A/restructuring, and excluded 'Depreciation/Amortization in SGA' per instructions. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Sales and marketing expenses, [Income Statement] Administrative expense

candidates.why: Best operating R&D expense line; appears to represent the reported product/R&D spending.
Capitalized amount, not the expense line itself.
D&A within R&D, not the core R&D expense to map here.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Amortization component, not the main R&D expense line.
Semantically explicit R&D label, but preview is empty; useful as secondary fallback.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental amortization disclosure, not main R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement R&D expense.

variables.notes: Preferred the apparent main R&D expense line and added the explicit R&D label as fallback for label variation. Excluded capitalized and amortization-related rows.

candidates.why: Broader finance-cost line; acceptable fallback if direct interest expense is unavailable.
Direct interest expense label; best choice when available.
Direct interest expense label; likely alternate label across periods.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Only a lease-interest subcomponent, not total interest expense.
Not specifically interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest subcomponent only.

variables.notes: Priority list uses direct interest expense labels first, then broader finance expense as fallback when direct interest is unavailable.

candidates.why: Best available equity line. No separate parent-equity line is shown.
Could double count with MIB; identical to Total equity here, suggesting no minority interest is present.
Total balance sheet, not equity.

variables.notes: No owner/parent-only equity line is visible, so used 'Total equity'. To avoid double counting, MIB is set to empty.

candidates.why: Not a standalone minority-interest line; same values as Total equity indicate no separate NCI disclosure.

variables.notes: No standalone minority interest / non-controlling interests line is present. Since BE uses 'Total equity', MIB is left empty to avoid double counting.
